description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a matte black finish with a modular design. The rifle is equipped with a collapsible stock, a detachable box magazine, and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control. It has a full-length Picatinny rail on top, supporting a mounted red dot or holographic sight, and additional rails for accessories. The barrel is of standard length and fitted with a suppressor at the muzzle. The receiver and handguard are constructed from metal, with polymer components for the grip and stock. The overall design is robust, ergonomic, and optimized for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, suppressor, vertical foregrip, and mounted sight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, suppressor, and mounted sight clearly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor, barrel alignment, and vertical foregrip beneath the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, stock, and accessory rails, mirroring the main features of the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the collapsible stock and the alignment of the upper receiver and sight.
